creator: stacey@vickiandstacey.com
text:
Attempt to portupgrade port to latest version in ports tree fails as follows:

cd: can't cd to /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade
cd: can't cd to /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade

(devel/gnome-vfs) failed (specify -k to force)

Fix: 

Don't know..,
How-To-Repeat: Update ports tree to latest for today
Attempt to portupgrade gaim-devel-2.0.0.b6_2 to latest version
